channel.title: Red Hook on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Red Hook on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Hometown BBQ
item.description: I’ve been here a few times already now. It’s always a trek to get here from the F/G train stop at Smith St, which is about a mile away. If you go walking at night, it’s a little sketchy at times. But this is supposedly the BBQ place to go to if you’re in NYC. Every single time I’ve come here, there’s always a wait for the food. On a Saturday night, it can be ~1 hour wait, but if you come right when it opens, you can get in pretty fast.
